data.description:
## Why
Workflow MCP tools must advertise validated output schemas and stay within client limits,
consistent with rebar's typed-read-tool discipline.

## What
- One result helper emitting both structuredContent and a self-sufficient text block.
- Committed JSON Schemas + module-level Pydantic return models for get_workflow_status /
  get_workflow_result (typed read tools, NOT added to NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT).
- Pagination + 25K-token discipline; extend the schema-coverage tests.

## Scope
- In: MCP output-schema discipline for the new workflow tools.
- Out: non-workflow tools.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] get_workflow_status/result ship committed schemas + Pydantic return models.
- [ ] Result helper emits structuredContent + self-sufficient text; results paginated under 25K tokens.
- [ ] Schema-coverage tests extended to the new tools.
data.title: MCP layer: typed outputSchema discipline for workflow tools
